conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 10 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Metastases - N (%) | Liver | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment of the trial who had liver as the metastatic site? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document defines 'high-volume disease' as including 'visceral metastases' but does not provide specific counts or percentages for liver metastases in the treatment arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document discusses high-volume disease defined by visceral and bone metastases, but does not provide a breakdown of the number and percentage of participants with liver metastases in the treatment arm."
